title: Worker Registration Response
description: Response sent by adapter to worker after successful registration via POST /workers/register. Contains the Redis queue key the worker should listen on for jobs.

ok.description: Always true on success. On failure, HTTP status is non-200.

worker_id.description: Echoed back from registration request for confirmation.

queue_key.description: Redis LIST key the worker should BRPOP on. Format: aq:queue:jobs:{worker_id}

adapter_version.description: Adapter version string for compatibility checking.

registered_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when registration was accepted.
